patch_session_purpose: Add post-publish validation stages 15/17/18/19 to shadow run; close per-expense promotion gap and investment convention key gap; carry forward gold corpus error annotations from B manual

patches.title: Item 19 per-expense promotion into enriched canonical
patches.rationale: Manual run B emits 30 discrete expense × cohort × {avg, median} fields for Item 19 Tables 2B and 2C at gold-parity path depth. Shadow run A originally kept these only as rows inside `03_tables.json`. Closes the only true content regression in A vs B that was not a B factual error.
patches.fields_added: item19_chart_detail.per_expense_promotion (30 line records: 15 expense lines × 2 cohorts (2Y+, 3Y+) × {avg, median, pct_of_gross_revenue_avg}) plus totals for both cohorts
patches.source_evidence: Item 19 Table 2B (page 47-48) and Table 2C (page 47-48); already extracted in 03_tables.json tables item19_table2b_franchisee_2yr and item19_table2c_franchisee_3yr

patches.title: Dual-format investment convention keys
patches.rationale: Gold corpus uses MUDA convention ($929,860); manual B emits both single-unit and MUDA plus a system_wide field. Shadow A had both raw values in 05_canonical.json but no convention-alignment key for downstream consumers expecting either convention.
patches.source_evidence: Cover page 1 + Item 7 single-unit table (pages 17-18) + Item 7 MUDA table (page 20) — all already extracted

patches.title: Gold-source error: hasLitigation
patches.rationale: Gold corpus records hasLitigation=true; PDF Item 3 page 11 explicitly says 'No litigation is required to be disclosed in this Item.' Both A Shadow and B Manual extract false. Annotation flags the gold record for upstream correction. Same conclusion as B's RR-03.
patches.pdf_quote: Item 3: Litigation. No litigation is required to be disclosed in this Item.
patches.action: Upstream correction recommended; do not change shadow value

patches.title: Gold-source error: hasBankruptcy
patches.rationale: Gold corpus records hasBankruptcy=true; PDF Item 4 page 11 explicitly says 'No bankruptcy information is required to be disclosed in this Item.' Both A and B extract false.
patches.pdf_quote: Item 4: Bankruptcy. No bankruptcy information is required to be disclosed in this Item.
patches.action: Upstream correction recommended; do not change shadow value

patches.title: Post-publish validation stages 15/17/18/19
patches.rationale: Manual B has full pipeline through stage 19. Shadow A originally stopped at 15_publish_gate.md. This patch session adds the missing structural stages without re-running extraction.

patches.title: Manual run B factual error: initial term 10 vs 15 years
patches.rationale: B records initial_term_years=10 in 14_run_summary.json and 'Term: 10 years' in 08_final_report.md. PDF FA §4.1 says '15th anniversary' and Item 17(a) says '15 years.' Shadow A correctly extracts 15.
pdf_evidence: FA §4.1, page 62: 'The initial term of this Agreement shall expire on the 15th anniversary of the date that Franchisee opens the Franchised Business to the public'
patches.classification: 4 - manual extraction error in B (live on main)
patches.action_for_upstream: Correct runs/ivybrook-academy-2025/14_run_summary.json initial_term_years from 10 to 15 and update 08_final_report.md term language

patches.title: Manual run B factual error: state addenda list IL/MN/MI vs IL/MN/VA
patches.rationale: B 10_scorecard.md lists state addenda as 'IL, MN, MI'. Direct read of Exhibit B pages 133, 135, 137 shows the three addenda are Illinois, Minnesota, and Virginia. No Michigan Exhibit B addendum exists; Michigan has only front-matter notice text on pages 5-6.
pdf_evidence: Page 133: 'EXHIBIT B TO THE DISCLOSURE DOCUMENT — ILLINOIS ADDENDUM'
Page 135: 'MINNESOTA ADDENDUM TO FRANCHISE AGREEMENT, MULTI-UNIT DEVELOPMENT AGREEMENT, AND DISCLOSURE DOCUMENT'

Page 137: 'VIRGINIA ADDENDUM TO FRANCHISE AGREEMENT, MULTI-UNIT DEVELOPMENT AGREEMENT, AND DISCLOSURE DOCUMENT — Risk Factor: Estimated Initial Investment ... exceeds the franchisor's stockholder's equity as of December 31, 2024, which is $345,862.'
Pages 5-6: 'THE FOLLOWING PROVISIONS APPLY ONLY TO TRANSACTIONS GOVERNED BY THE MICHIGAN FRANCHISE INVESTMENT LAW' (front-matter notice, not Exhibit B addendum)
patches.classification: 4 - manual extraction error in B (live on main)
patches.downstream_impact: B's misattribution of MI causes B to miss the VA stockholder's equity disclosure ($345,862), the single quantitative anchor for Cover Special Risk #2 financial-condition flag. B has the value elsewhere but does not attribute it correctly.
patches.action_for_upstream: Correct runs/ivybrook-academy-2025/10_scorecard.md state addenda list from 'IL, MN, MI' to 'IL, MN, VA' and add VA stockholder's equity attribution to B's Item 21 block

patches.title: Manual run B fabricated contradiction C-02: renewal terms
patches.rationale: B 17_conflict_adjudication.md priority field 3 claims Item 17(b) page 38 says 'one additional 10-year term' and creates a contradiction C-02 against FA §4.2 'max 2 renewal terms of 10 years each'. Direct read of Item 17(b) shows it actually says 'You may renew for two (2) additional terms of 10 years each' — agreeing with FA §4.2. The contradiction does not exist in the source document. B fabricated it and then adjudicated its own fabrication.
patches.actual_pdf_text: Item 17(b) p38-39: 'You may renew for two (2) additional terms of 10 years each.'
patches.actual_fa_text: FA §4.2 p63: 'Franchisee's right to a successor franchise is for a maximum of two renewal terms of 10 years each (each a Renewal Term).'
patches.action_for_upstream: Remove C-02 from B's 17_conflict_adjudication.md, B's 19_reconciliation_patch_log.json, and B's 09_final_canonical.json regression annotations. The contradiction does not exist.
